← Demo home

Playground

Stick figures with body parts — punch, kick, rotate any limb. (~25 s)

▶ markdy

Story acts

  1. 0s Lily appears; Bruno & Alex enter from opposite sides
  2. 2.2s Idle wave — arm_left / arm_right rotate_part
  3. 3.1s Declarations of love; Lily's head tilts (head rotate_part)
  4. 7.0s Lily steps aside — rivals charge
  5. 7.8s Fight: punches, kicks, body/head rotations
  6. 10.1s Alex is knocked out — fist pump (arm_right rotate_part)
  7. 11.8s Bruno approaches holding flower
  8. 14.0s Lily rejects — arm wave, head shake
  9. 18.0s Lily kneels to comfort Alex
  10. 23.0s Bruno alone, head drooping 😔
View MarkdyScript source 
scene width=920 height=460 fps=30 bg=#fff5f9

asset flower = image("/memes/flower.png")

# Bruno = right-side guy  (#c68642 skin, default male)
# Alex  = left-side guy   (#8d5524 darker skin)
# Lily  = girl            (#fad4c0 light skin, "f" = female variant)
actor bruno = figure(#c68642)    at (740, 200)
actor alex  = figure(#8d5524)    at (120, 200)
actor lily  = figure(#fad4c0, f) at (430, 200) opacity 0

# ── Act 1: entrances ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
@0.0: lily.fade_in(dur=0.7)
@0.8: bruno.enter(from=right, dur=1.0)
@1.1: alex.enter(from=left,  dur=1.0)

# Idle wave — show off arm rotation
@2.2: bruno.rotate_part(part=arm_left,  to=-80, dur=0.3)
@2.2: alex.rotate_part(part=arm_right,  to=80,  dur=0.3)
@2.6: bruno.rotate_part(part=arm_left,  to=25,  dur=0.3)
@2.6: alex.rotate_part(part=arm_right,  to=-25, dur=0.3)

# ── Act 2: declarations ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
@3.1: bruno.say("I love you! 😍", dur=1.4)
@3.6: alex.say("She is mine! 😤",  dur=1.4)
@5.2: lily.say("Oh my... 😳",      dur=1.1)
@5.2: lily.rotate_part(part=head,  to=10,  dur=0.25)
@5.6: lily.rotate_part(part=head,  to=-10, dur=0.25)
@6.0: lily.rotate_part(part=head,  to=0,   dur=0.2)

# ── Act 3: rivals charge ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
@6.5: lily.move(to=(810, 200), dur=0.5, ease=out)
@7.0: bruno.move(to=(455, 200), dur=0.65, ease=in)
@7.0: alex.move(to=(370, 200),  dur=0.65, ease=in)

# ── Act 4: fight! ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Exchange 1 — simultaneous punches
@7.8:  bruno.punch(side=left,  dur=0.32)
@7.8:  alex.punch(side=right,  dur=0.32)
@7.85: bruno.shake(intensity=7, dur=0.3)
@7.85: alex.shake(intensity=7,  dur=0.3)

# Exchange 2 — alex kicks, bruno punches back
@8.3:  alex.kick(side=right,   dur=0.36)
@8.4:  bruno.shake(intensity=9, dur=0.32)
@8.5:  bruno.punch(side=left,  dur=0.28)
@8.55: alex.shake(intensity=8,  dur=0.28)

# Exchange 3 — body movement
@8.95: alex.rotate_part(part=body,  to=15,  dur=0.2)
@8.95: bruno.rotate_part(part=body, to=-10, dur=0.2)
@9.15: alex.rotate_part(part=body,  to=0,   dur=0.2)
@9.15: bruno.rotate_part(part=body, to=0,   dur=0.2)

# Finishing blow — head snap on alex
@9.4:  bruno.punch(side=left, dur=0.25)
@9.45: alex.rotate_part(part=head, to=35, dur=0.2)
@9.5:  alex.shake(intensity=12, dur=0.45)

# ── Act 5: knockout ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
@10.1: alex.rotate(to=90, dur=0.4)
@10.2: alex.move(to=(370, 310), dur=0.4, ease=in)
@10.4: alex.fade_out(dur=0.45)
@10.1: bruno.say("I win! 💪",   dur=1.5)
@10.1: bruno.rotate_part(part=arm_right, to=-130, dur=0.3)
@10.5: bruno.rotate_part(part=arm_right, to=-25,  dur=0.4)

# ── Act 6: approaches with flower ─────────────────────────────────────────
@11.8: bruno.move(to=(580, 200), dur=0.9, ease=out)
@11.8: bruno.rotate_part(part=arm_left, to=-90, dur=0.5)
@13.0: bruno.throw(flower, to=lily, dur=0.8)

# ── Act 7: rejection ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
@14.0: lily.say("No thank you. 🙅", dur=2.0)
@14.1: lily.shake(intensity=5, dur=0.4)
@14.1: lily.rotate_part(part=arm_right, to=80, dur=0.3)
@14.5: lily.rotate_part(part=arm_right, to=8,  dur=0.3)
@16.2: bruno.say("But I fought! 😢", dur=1.4)
@16.2: bruno.rotate_part(part=head, to=10, dur=0.3)
@16.7: bruno.move(to=(860, 200), dur=1.2, ease=in)

# ── Act 8: girl comforts loser ────────────────────────────────────────────
@18.0: alex.fade_in(dur=0.7)
@18.5: lily.move(to=(450, 200), dur=0.5, ease=out)
@19.3: lily.move(to=(375, 305), dur=0.9, ease=inout)
@20.3: lily.rotate_part(part=arm_right, to=-70, dur=0.35)
@20.6: lily.say("Hey, you okay? 💕", dur=2.1)
@20.8: alex.say("You came... 🥺",    dur=1.9)
@21.0: alex.rotate_part(part=arm_left, to=-60, dur=0.4)

# ── Act 9: curtain ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
@23.0: bruno.say("...why 😔", dur=2.0)
@23.0: bruno.rotate_part(part=head, to=-15, dur=0.5)
